slides.title: Financial Highlights
slides.speakerNotes: Revenue came in at $16.2 billion, beating our internal target by three percent. Year-over-year that's an 8.4% increase, driven mainly by the cloud segment. Let's look at what's behind those numbers.

slides.title: Scaled Dot-Product Attention

slots.text: Attention is just a weighted sum
Each output token blends every input token, weighted by how relevant the model thinks it is.

slots.alt: Attention of Q, K, V equals softmax of Q times K-transpose, divided by square root of d_k, applied to V.

slots.text: The 1/√d_k scaling keeps gradients well-behaved as embedding dimension grows.

slides.speakerNotes: This is the only equation we need to keep on screen. Walk it left to right: Q-K-transpose gives raw similarity scores; the square-root-d-k denominator stops them blowing up at high dimensions; softmax turns them into a probability distribution; that distribution weights V into the output. The whole transformer is iterated softmaxes of dot products.
